feed.title: SAP Community - SAP Datasphere
feed.subtitle: SAP Datasphere Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: How to get details of Users and their roles in ICM
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

Trying to build a report that shows the list of application users in ICM. I am tried joining tables: CSI_USER, CSI_USERGROUP and CSI_GROUP. But 'Roles' information related to users is missing. Is there any table(s) to get this info. Pls provide inputs on this. Thanks!

--

KRPK

SAP SuccessFactors Incentive Management SAP Datasphere

entry.title: All leaf elements must be used as part of the association between dimension and hierarchy
entry.content:
Hi,

I get an error when I associate a graphical view with semantic type “Dimension”  with an “Hierarchy with directory”-GraphicalView

All leaf elements must be used as part of the association between dimension and hierarchy.

I use BW objects / tables: /BI0/MCS_ITEM, RSHIEDIR, /BI0/HCS_ITEM and  like described here:

Hierarchien aus SAP BW in Datasphere abbilden: So geht's

As 0CS_ITEM is compounded to 0CS_CHART, I have also created the columns CS_CHART and CS_ITEM. CS_ITEM no longer starts with “BN”, which semantically means the CS_CHART.

Hierarchy Settings (2_GV_CS_ITEM_HIERWITHDIRECTORY_01):

 

I have also tried further settings (2_GV_CS_ITEM_HIERWITHDIRECTORY_02).

CS_ITEM and NODE_WO_COMPND (WO_COMPND = without compounding) don’t contain ‘BN’ which semantically means the 0CS_CHART.

 

In this case I get a different error:

"2_GV_CS_ITEM_01" - Hierarchy 2_GV_CS_ITEM_HIERWITHDIRECTORY_02 is incorrectly defined.

Compounded node "0CS_ITEM" is associated to non-compounded entity 2_GV_CS_ITEM_HIERWITHDIRECTORY_02.

Representative key must be set for the entity 2_GV_CS_ITEM_HIERWITHDIRECTORY_02.

I tried different combinations for representative key,

Compounded: NODEID/ HIEID, Representative: HIEID

Compounded: HIEID/ NODEID/ CS_CHART/ CS_ITEM, Representative: CS_ITEM

Compounded: NODEID/ CS_CHART/ CS_ITEM, Representative: CS_ITEM

As NODEID is defined as a child column under “Multiple hierarchy settings”, it must be a key column, otherwise there is an error

Child Column must be a key column for the entity "2_GV_CS_ITEM_HIERWITHDIRECTORY_02.

Do you have any suggestions?

Best Regards

Nadine

entry.title: How to realize a profit and loss statement in a Datasphere analysis model
entry.content:
I am trying to display a profit and loss statement report in SAC with an analytical model defined in Datasphere, but account dimensions are not enough, I also need
formulas. I also need formulas for operating income, net income, etc.
How can I devise a way to express this?
I would appreciate it if someone could help me.
Thank you in advance.

entry.title: How can you determine what business content artefacts would be or has been updated?
entry.content:
Hello all,

Does Business Content updates, ACTUALLY update an original (i.e. overwrite), or are updates always new versions (i.e. SAP_xxxxxx_V2).

Let me take this example. "Finance Foundation for SAP S/4HANA and SAP S/4HANA Cloud", what changes are made in version 1.6.1?

Ideally, I wish to pick and choose the artefacts that have been udpated? How can I see what updates are in this version?

entry.title: Sap DataSphere local table partition size
entry.content: In DataSphere when a local table is partitioned using Hash Partition type with  10 partition and have data which is of 6 Billion , so what will be the size of each partition.

entry.title: CDS views for material coverage data
entry.content:
Hi all

finding the right data for Datasphere and SAC is always a big challange. We need to evaluate material coverage data, like

- inventory range

- last MRP run

- reported inventory stock

- safety inventory stock

- undercoverage information (time-to, first appearance...)

Can anyone give me a hint which CDS view can be useful?

entry.title: CDS view I_COSTCENTERTEXT is inconsistent in Replication Flow
entry.content:
Hello,

 

While setting up a replication flow I'm getting the error "CDS view I_COSTCENTERTEXT is inconsistent" on that CDS view.

I've seen several posts on troubles with CDS views but honestly, as this is a standard SAP view I have no idea who to contact, where to post or create an issue.

Any suggestions ?

entry.title: How to get Datasphere's objects and data loads metadata - last changes
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

Can someone provide inputs on the tables where we get the below information in SAP Datasphere:

a) Datasphere objects (Graphical views, Tables, Analytic models) - Last changed on, Last Changed by

b) Datasphere Data loads (batch/real time/data replication) - wanted to know when the loads are updated in Datasphere for any given table.

Need is to build a story to track/monitor the last done changes of DSP objects & data loads. Thanks!

--

KRPK

entry.title: Loading Master and Transactional Data from Datasphere into SAC - Seamless Planing
entry.content:
Hi,

i have created a planning model in SAC, which is also stored and managed in SAP Datasphere.

To load master data and transactional data from Datasphere views into my model, the only method I have found so far is to create OData service connections.

Since I’m working with multiple dimensions, this approach results in a large number of individual connections being visible in SAC, which significantly reduces clarity and usability.

My questions:

  1. Is this currently the only way to integrate master and transactional data from Datasphere views into a SAC planning model that is also stored in Datasphere?

  2. In the context of Seamless Planning, would this OData-based approach be considered appropriate – or are there best practices that suggest otherwise?

Thank you in advance for your support and feedback.

entry.title: Connect DPAgent hosted on our own Azure cloud to S4 Hana on SAP RISE connection to BTP Datasphere
entry.content:
Hi experts!

For our SAP RISE contract we have only 1 DPAgent enabled, and now it is being used for another SAP integration. So we are planning to use our Azure to get a Windows/Linux Server to install our own DPAgent. We have previously installed DPAgents within our internal cloud network, for SQL connections to SAP Hana cloud.

The thing is that we are not sure if the procedure remains the same, because the DPAgent will be on our internal cloud network, so it doesn't have access to the same vnet as the SAP RISE S4 Hana. I know we will need public IP in our DPAgent server on azure, but after that the configurations remains the same? Or what would be the steps for this mixed integration (DPAgent self-hosted and S4 Hana SAP RISE, and BTP Datasphere)

Thanks in advance!

Best Regards,

Leo

entry.title: How to Handle Currency Decimal Places in Amount Conversion and Reporting in Datasphere
entry.content:
Hello.

I have a question regarding currency conversion for amounts.

I use KRW, which has zero decimal places. For example, when I enter 1,000 in the SAP system, it is stored internally as 10.00. Therefore, in the reporting layer, I multiply the amount fields by 100.

The problem is that if there are hundreds of amount fields, I have to repeat this calculation hundreds of times in the script.

,CASE WHEN "REC_WAERS" = 'KRW' THEN "VV201_F" * 100 ELSE "VV201_F" END AS "VV201_F"
,CASE WHEN "REC_WAERS" = 'KRW' THEN "VV201_T" * 100 ELSE "VV201_T" END AS "VV201_T"
,CASE WHEN "REC_WAERS" = 'KRW' THEN "VV201_V" * 100 ELSE "VV201_V" END AS "VV201_V"


What are the available methods for handling currency decimal places in Datasphere or a CDS View, and what is the simplest way to manage this?


I would also appreciate it if you could share some typical use cases for how this is handled in practice.

entry.title: Why is health monitoring not working for Datasphere?
entry.content:
We have Datasphere in our Landscape of Cloud ALM. Health monitoring was initially collecting data, but suddenly stopped working. i have triple checked the setup procedures, which is like a dog chasing its tail... 

Can someone provide concise instructions from cradle to grave on connecting Datasphere and Cloud ALM?

entry.title: How to provision from Datasphere to IAS?
entry.content:
Dear all,

I have the following use case: I want to provision all existing users and roles from Datasphere to our IAS. I have already taken into account the guidance from [SAP Note 3559583](https://userapps.support.sap.com/sap/support/knowledge/en/3559583). User provisioning works successfully; however, I am unable to convert the roles into groups in IAS and assign the corresponding members to those groups. In the provisioning log, I can also see the role names as a group attribute. From experience, I know that this setup works, for example, with EntraID. Has anyone worked on a similar case or has an idea what might be missing? I would appreciate any suggestions.

Thank you!

entry.title: Exploring Seamless Planning via Free Trial SAP BDC
entry.content:
Hi,

I want to explore seamless planning via Free Trial version of SAP BDC.

1- When I try creating a planning model within SAC system provided as part of BDC Free Trial, the option is not available  ( grayed out) . I can only create an analytical model. See below

 

Is it because the free trial user has only BI license but not planning? I can't confirm this either as I don't have access to "users" section within SAC but looking at the tasks I can do in this sytem, it suggests it is a BI license.

2- I also want to try importing data from SAC DSP into SAC via OData ( that's the only option to consume actuals for planning purpose from DSP) but there seems no ODATa connection by default. I would create myself but I can't see OAuth Client ID etc in corresponding BDC DSP system either becuase the step 3 described in below screenshot is not accessible by free trial user in DSP system 

Just want to ensure if I am not missing anything .Security wise these steps might be demanding and not possible but it would be great to be able to explore seamless planning and data acquisition from DSP to SAC  via free trial versions as well. Is there a workaround ?

entry.title: End-to-End Data Modeling Architecture in SAP Datasphere
entry.content:
🚀End-to-End Data Modeling Architecture in SAP Datasphere

📌By Uday Kiran Munnangi

🔍Introduction

As organizations modernize their data landscapes, the need for a unified, governed, and scalable data architecture becomes critical. In this blog, I’m excited to share a comprehensive end-to-end architecture I’ve designed using SAP Datasphere — showcasing how data flows from SAP source systems to analytics tools in a seamless, secure, and business-ready manner.

 

 

🧠 Why SAP Datasphere?

SAP Datasphere acts as the central data fabric for integrating, modeling, securing, and exposing data across hybrid SAP environments. It enables both technical and business users to collaborate on trusted data models without duplicating or moving data unnecessarily.

🏗️ Core Components of SAP Datasphere

🔹Data Builder – The Technical Modeling Layer

  • Create Remote Tables via federation (no replication needed)
  • Build Tables and Views for transformation logic
  • Use Intelligent Lookup to enrich relationships
  • Apply Data Access Control (DAC) for secure, role-based access

🔹Business Builder – The Semantic Layer

  • Define Facts (e.g., revenue, quantity)
  • Model Dimensions (e.g., customer, region)
  • Add Texts and Hierarchies for drill-down and multilingual support
  • Output Reusable Analytic Models for consumption across tools

🌐Source System Integration

🔸On-Premise SAP Systems

System Connection Type Adapter Used

SAP S/4HANA (on-prem)DPA + Cloud ConnectorABAP Adapter
SAP ECCDPA + Cloud ConnectorABAP Adapter
SAP BW/4HANADPA + Cloud ConnectorHANA Adapter
SAP HANA (on-prem)DPA onlyHANA Adapter
  • ✅Data Provisioning Agent (DPA) enables federation and replication
  • ✅SAP Cloud Connector ensures secure tunnel communication

🔸Cloud SAP Systems

System Connection Type Authentication

SAP S/4HANA CloudHTTPS (API-based)OAuth 2.0
SAP SuccessFactorsHTTPS (OData v2)OAuth 2.0 / SAML
SAP AribaHTTPS (SOAP/OData APIs)API Token / OAuth

📊Front-End Consumption Tools

Once modeled, data can be consumed by a wide range of analytics and planning tools:

  • 🔷SAP Analytics Cloud (SAC) – Live dashboards and stories
  • 🔶SAC for Planning – Planning-enabled models via OData
  • 🔸Microsoft Analysis for Office – Excel-based live reporting
  • 🟡 Power BI, Tableau, and others – via ODBC/JDBC

🧩 Additional Features That Matter

  • Space Management – Logical separation of projects and teams
  • Catalog & Data Marketplace – Discover and reuse trusted data assets
  • Connections Panel – Centralized control over all source system links

✅Why This Architecture Matters

  • Simplifies SAP data integration across hybrid landscapes
  • Delivers business-context-ready models
  • Reduces reliance on complex ETL pipelines
  • Ensures governed, secure, and reusable data
  • Enables real-time analytics and planning

📣Final Thoughts

This architecture is designed to help enterprises unlock the full potential of their SAP data — with agility, governance, and scalability at its core.

If you found this helpful or have questions, feel free to comment or connect with me. Let’s keep learning and building together!

🔖#SAPDatasphere #SAPBTP #SAPAnalyticsCloud #DPAgent #PowerBI #DataIntegration #BW4HANA #S4HANA #DataModeling #SAPCloud #Analytics #UdayKiranMunnangi

entry.title: SAP Datasphere dynamic source filter
entry.content:
Hi,

I am trying to put a source filter on a Salesforce source (derived via open connectors), to give me a delta.

On the source and target table I have a LastModifiedDate  as a timestamp.

The source filter I am applying is LastModifiedDate Greater Than $MAX_VALUE_LastModifiedDate.

In theory this should return the MAX LastModifiedDate from the target and apply it to the source so we only ask for the delta.

For some reason when it runs its complaining about the format.

HTTP 400: {"requestId":"6866753ce4b04a35c8c7f206","providerErrorCode":400,"message":"Bad Request","providerMessage":"[{\"message\":\"\\nWHERE LastModifiedDate > 2025-07-02 03:08:49.000000000 ORDER BY Id\\n ^\\nERROR at Row:1:Column:3466\\nunexpected token: '03'\",\"errorCode\":\"MALFORMED_QUERY\"}]"}

If I hard code a filter like this..... LastModifiedDate Greater Than 2025-07-03T14:00:00.000Z it works as expected.

I can't see a way of adding a modifier around this so I can't force a format unfortunately. 

Any help with this or a work  around would be great

entry.title: Set a default hierarchy
entry.content:
Let us assume to have a Datasphere Analytical Model where at least one field has "hierarchies with directory" hierarchy related. Let us assume to have all the required associations, in the Analytical Model, to have all these hierarchies available for selection.

My question is: is there a way to flag, one of these hierarchies as the default hierarchy? As far as I see, the default hierarchy is always the flat hierarchy. Nevertheless, my goal is to let the user to choose his own default hierarchy, in such a way that, when he opens the Analytical Model and select the field for the row or column section, the system already does the preselection on the defaulted hierarchy.

I hope to have been able to explain my doubt and what I am trying to do.

Thanks in advance for your help

Regards

Andrea

entry.title: What is the recommended way to configure a connection between Datasphere and Amazon RDS?
entry.content:
Hello,

Are there recommendations, documentation or examples on how to establish a connection between Datasphere and an Amazon RDS instance that hosts a PostgreSQL database?

entry.title: How to do a cube to cube join in Datasphere?
entry.content:
I have two data models - Cube A & Cube B. I don't see any option to add cubes (RL Layer of a model) into graphical view.
Is there any other way I can join two datasphere analytical models / cubes together? Any help document would be really appreciated!

Thanks!

entry.title: Problems when trying to stop a Replication Flow in SAP Datasphere
entry.content:
Hello experts, good day.

We're experiencing an unusual error, or at least something like this hasn't occurred in the few months we've been using DS on our project.

One of my colleagues wanted to stop one of the RFs so he could run a deployd with adjustment, but after stopping the view on the monitor, it hasn't changed from "Stopping" to "Stopped" for almost two hours.

When trying to force or stop it again, the following message appears

We can provide the following information to assist either you or an SAP engineer to solve the issue:

Correlation ID: fcfc656169facbe8ccd02eb3aabab21f
HTTP Status: 400 error
Error Code: ERROR_REPLICATION_FLOW_STOP_TRIGGERED_STOPPING
Technical Message: Stopping Replication flow is already in progress

So we don't know how we could stop it or what could be causing this error.

Could you help us?

Regards.
EBZ
